name: cursedobject
description: Object template engine: expressions, async directives, and calculated field selection. Bring your own YAML/JSON parser.
author: Matthew Trost

scripts.test: for f in $(find . -name '*.test.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path './.next/*' | sort); do echo "Running $f"; tsx "$f" || exit 1; done
